text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out with Narita<n>Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nothing special... Just take a look over<n>there.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I turn in the direction Narita Taishin is<n>pointing and
see a claw machine filled<n>with Umamusume
plushies.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They're apparently all the rage right<n>now. Not that
I'm interested or<n>anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I sometimes see 'em dangling from<n>other
people's bags and stuff,<n>though.
choice_data_list: Do you want one for your bag too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me? Were you even<n>listening? I'm not
intere—
choice_data_list: But look how well-made they are!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Do whatever you feel like.Just don't drag me into it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: If you want one so badly, get ityourself. I mean, if you can.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
